hints.question: How do I see what is on the square I am standing on?
hints.answer: Use the new direction: `look("down")`. It returns the emoji on your current square, which is the one you might want to pick up.

hints.question: Which special emojis should I ignore?
hints.answer: Skip anything in the standard list: `"star"`, `"flag"`, `"white square"`, `"fire"`, `"poop"`, `"brick"`. Any other emoji is fair game to collect.

hints.question: How do I count emojis using a dictionary?
hints.answer: Use `hasKey(dict, emoji)` to see if you have seen it before. If yes, add `1` to `dict[emoji]`. If no, set `dict[emoji] = 1` to start the count.

hints.question: How do I stop picking up the same emoji every time I step on it?
hints.answer: Call `removeEmoji()` straight after counting it. The square becomes empty so it will not be counted again on a future pass.

hints.question: What do I do once I reach the flag?
hints.answer: Call `announceEmojis(result)` with your dictionary as the argument. Do this once, after you have moved onto the finishing square.
